title: Adventure Panorama (Vanilla Shading)
description: A new look for Minecraft's menu (Vanilla shading version)
body:
![Title card reading "Adventure Panorama Vanilla Shading edition"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4a0853a2f6b968b4c1f3543c400e978c5ee5b28d.png)
![image showcasing the new menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3496f1d442aa49bf95f2cc562b0e71d74a89a47d.png)
# About
- 📃 This resource pack changes the Minecraft menu to a table top view inspired by Sea of Theives' menu.
- ✏️ No mods required. Works with a 100% vanilla instance.
- 🖼️ The artwork is mine (created in Blender 3D)
- 🔎 Have suggustions, requests, or issues? Use the issue tracker linked on the right.
______________________________________________________________________________________________
**Looking for a shaded version? Check out the original pack!**
[![The link to the vanilla shading version](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d71b0132cb07abb73c694348c2f025b2d36a5498.png)](https://modrinth.com/project/WR8cPQDg)
